news.title:
Kotak initiates Buy on Aditya Birla Capital with ₹390 TP, citing strong growth in ₹1.5 tn NBFC AUM.
HFC projects ~51% CAGR FY24–FY26E with ₹422 bn AUM; non-lending business supports profitability.
news.summary:
Kotak initiates Buy on Aditya Birla Capital with ₹390 TP, citing strong growth in ₹1.5 tn NBFC AUM.
HFC projects ~51% CAGR FY24–FY26E with ₹422 bn AUM; non-lending business supports profitability.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital allotted Rs. 755 cr NCDs via private placement.
Tenors range 2.5-10 years, coupons vary from 7.1% to 9.15%.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital allotted Rs. 755 cr NCDs via private placement.
Tenors range 2.5-10 years, coupons vary from 7.1% to 9.15%.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital invests Rs. 749.9 crore in Aditya Birla Housing Finance via rights shares.
The investment aims to support growth and enhance leverage ratio for the subsidiary.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital invests Rs. 749.9 crore in Aditya Birla Housing Finance via rights shares.
The investment aims to support growth and enhance leverage ratio for the subsidiary.

news.title:
ABSLI faced a tax demand of ₹464.81 cr for AY 21-22, later nullified.
ITAT remanded the case; AO approved ABSLI's claim on Feb 28, 2026.
news.summary:
ABSLI faced a tax demand of ₹464.81 cr for AY 21-22, later nullified.
ITAT remanded the case; AO approved ABSLI's claim on Feb 28, 2026.

news.title: BNP Paribas Financial Markets bought 976 shares of Aditya Birla Capital at avg price of 345.3.
news.summary: BNP Paribas Financial Markets bought 976 shares of Aditya Birla Capital at avg price of 345.3.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital allotted 163 unsecured, listed, taxable perpetual debentures worth Rs. 163 crore.
Debentures have a face value of Rs. 1 crore each, 8.4% p.a. coupon rate, annual interest paid every Feb 27.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital allotted 163 unsecured, listed, taxable perpetual debentures worth Rs. 163 crore.
Debentures have a face value of Rs. 1 crore each, 8.4% p.a. coupon rate, annual interest paid every Feb 27.

news.title:
India Ratings affirms IND AAA Stable for Aditya Birla Sun Life Insurance's Rs. 1,300 crore subordinated debts.
Positive credit perception driven by stable outlooks for Aditya Birla Capital Ltd.
news.summary:
India Ratings affirms IND AAA Stable for Aditya Birla Sun Life Insurance's Rs. 1,300 crore subordinated debts.
Positive credit perception driven by stable outlooks for Aditya Birla Capital Ltd.

news.title:
AB Capital, L&T Finance added to MSCI Index; IRCTC exits.
AB Capital, L&T Finance, AU Bank set for inflows; IRCTC faces outflows.
news.summary:
AB Capital, L&T Finance added to MSCI Index; IRCTC exits.
AB Capital, L&T Finance, AU Bank set for inflows; IRCTC faces outflows.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital to join MSCI February rejig at 3 PM today.
Expected inclusion of USD 270M (Rs 24.6B) in MSCI index.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital to join MSCI February rejig at 3 PM today.
Expected inclusion of USD 270M (Rs 24.6B) in MSCI index.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital held investor meetings on 25 Feb 2026, engaging funds like HDFC Life, Kotak Securities, LIC Mutual Fund.
Presentation discussed in meetings is available on www.adityabirlacapital.com; no unpublished price-sensitive info was shared.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital held investor meetings on 25 Feb 2026, engaging funds like HDFC Life, Kotak Securities, LIC Mutual Fund.
Presentation discussed in meetings is available on www.adityabirlacapital.com; no unpublished price-sensitive info was shared.

news.title:
CRISIL assigned AAA Stable rating to Aditya Birla Capital's Rs 500 Cr subordinate debt.
AAA Stable ratings reaffirmed on Rs 195 Cr, Rs 155 Cr, and Rs 200 Cr debt.
news.summary:
CRISIL assigned AAA Stable rating to Aditya Birla Capital's Rs 500 Cr subordinate debt.
AAA Stable ratings reaffirmed on Rs 195 Cr, Rs 155 Cr, and Rs 200 Cr debt.

news.title:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.
Stocks include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NBCC, Aditya Birla Capital, DLF, and others. ASM framework stocks also impacted.
news.summary:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.
Stocks include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NBCC, Aditya Birla Capital, DLF, and others. ASM framework stocks also impacted.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital Ltd confirmed interest and redemption payments for NCDs as per SEBI regulations.
Total interest paid includes Rs. 3083.1 lakh for Perpetual Debt and Rs. 666.6 lakh for NCD Series I3.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital Ltd confirmed interest and redemption payments for NCDs as per SEBI regulations.
Total interest paid includes Rs. 3083.1 lakh for Perpetual Debt and Rs. 666.6 lakh for NCD Series I3.

news.title:
MSCI will include Aditya Birla Capital and L&T Finance in Global Standard Indexes from Feb 27, 2026.
IRCTC will be removed from the MSCI Global Standard Indexes on the same date.
news.summary:
MSCI will include Aditya Birla Capital and L&T Finance in Global Standard Indexes from Feb 27, 2026.
IRCTC will be removed from the MSCI Global Standard Indexes on the same date.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed AAA Stable ratings for Aditya Birla Capital's NCDs, denoting strong credit quality.
Certain ratings were withdrawn as per the company's filings.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed AAA Stable ratings for Aditya Birla Capital's NCDs, denoting strong credit quality.
Certain ratings were withdrawn as per the company's filings.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital reports 41% PAT growth in Q3 FY26.
The company targets a 25% loan book CAGR moving forward.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital reports 41% PAT growth in Q3 FY26.
The company targets a 25% loan book CAGR moving forward.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital Ltd reported no deviations in the use of Rs 4,665 crore raised via listed NCDs for Q4 2025.
Funds were allocated for financing activities, loan repayment, and operational needs, adhering to stated objectives.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital Ltd reported no deviations in the use of Rs 4,665 crore raised via listed NCDs for Q4 2025.
Funds were allocated for financing activities, loan repayment, and operational needs, adhering to stated objectives.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital Q3 net profit rose to 9.5B vs 7.1B YoY.
Revenue surged to 119B in Q3 compared to 94B YoY.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital Q3 net profit rose to 9.5B vs 7.1B YoY.
Revenue surged to 119B in Q3 compared to 94B YoY.

news.title:
Aditya Birla Capital approved Q3 FY25 financials and added two independent directors.
The company approved fund-raising via debt securities within specified limits.
news.summary:
Aditya Birla Capital approved Q3 FY25 financials and added two independent directors.
The company approved fund-raising via debt securities within specified limits.

news.title: Advent re-enters Aditya Birla Capital with a ₹2,750 crore housing finance deal.
news.summary: Advent re-enters Aditya Birla Capital with a ₹2,750 crore housing finance deal.
